## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Compatibility and security

Describe any effect on the exported API, wire encoding, defensive limits,
transaction digests, or minimum Go version. Write "None" when there is no
effect.

## Verification

List the tests, fuzzing, vectors, or benchmarks used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for observable behavior.
- [ ] I ran `make ci` or the documented equivalent commands.
- [ ] I updated public documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` when needed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private transaction data, or an unpatched vulnerability.
